site.title: velometeo
scenario.rm.note: The 90 h limit is for Randonneurs Mondiaux events (1200 km+), not BRM.
wind.head: headwind
status.upcoming: Forecast for {date} — the event day. Use it to prepare for the ride.
status.past: The event has passed. Showing the forecast for {date} (today).
weather.waiting: The forecast becomes available ~{days} days before the event.
weather.unavailable: Weather data is temporarily unavailable. The route and scenarios are still shown — try again later.
notes.title: Technical notes
notes.data: Weather data comes from Open-Meteo (ECMWF model) and loads fresh every time the page opens. Missing values are shown as —.
notes.perPosition: Each hour's weather is fetched for the rider's actual position along the route at that time — a long route can show different conditions at the start, middle, and finish.
error.unknownEvent: This event does not exist. See the list on the main page.
error.badRoute: The route for this event could not be read.
howto.title: How to read this forecast
howto.text: Pick the scenario closest to your pace. Each hour shows the approximate kilometer and the likely weather in that area — if your pace differs, use the kilometer as your reference.
